hero.lead: Four private cottages nestled in the hills above Grecia—each one a quiet place to rest, breathe, and reconnect with nature.
hero.imageAlt: Mango Valley pool and gardens overlooking the valley near Grecia, Costa Rica

cottages.title: Mariposa Cottage
cottages.description: Elegant and spacious, this cottage has two twin beds and en-suite bathroom with shower.
cottages.imageAlt: Mariposa Cottage twin beds at Mango Valley

cottages.title: Colibri Cottage
cottages.description: Hand-made queen bed with orthopedic mattress, roomy closet, and en-suite bathroom with shower.
cottages.imageAlt: Colibri Cottage queen bed at Mango Valley

cottages.title: Poas Cottage
cottages.description: Two rooms and a terrace overlooking hummingbird-filled greenery, with queen bed, dining table, and sweeping Poás views.
cottages.imageAlt: Poas Cottage bedroom at Mango Valley

cottages.title: Morpho Cottage
cottages.description: Our most popular cottage—queen bed, SKY TV, WiFi, en-suite jacuzzi, and terrace views of the volcano and coffee plantations.
cottages.imageAlt: Morpho Cottage bed and jacuzzi suite at Mango Valley

newsletter.title: The Forest Letter
newsletter.description: Receive seasonal updates, botanical wisdom, and exclusive retreat offerings directly in your inbox.
